title: Consecutive Available Seats
description: Find all seats that are free and consecutive (adjacent seat_id values, both free).
constraints: seat_id is an auto-increment primary key (consecutive integers starting from 1)
Result must be ordered by seat_id ascending
key_concept: Self-join on same table with adjacent row condition: ABS(c1.seat_id - c2.seat_id) = 1. Both must be free.

hints.L1: Self-join the cinema table to find adjacent seats. Both must have free = 1.
hints.L2: JOIN Cinema c2 ON ABS(c1.seat_id - c2.seat_id) = 1 WHERE c1.free = 1 AND c2.free = 1.
hints.L3: SELECT DISTINCT c1.seat_id FROM Cinema c1 JOIN Cinema c2 ON ABS(c1.seat_id - c2.seat_id) = 1 WHERE c1.free = 1 AND c2.free = 1 ORDER BY c1.seat_id
